programmes.show_description: When visual artists discover strange copies of their work appearing online, they soon find that they have been made by AI. But just how does Gen AI mimic artistic styles in photos and paintings, and w
CNA correspondents bring you the top stories of the day with 'live' reports and interviews to keep you up-to-date on the day's events.
From street food to smart tech, traditions to trending lifestyles, Singapore Hour is your ultimate insider's guide to travel, work, and play in the Lion City.
Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

We look at how Singapore hawker food is built on the food of home, usually made of humble ingredients. One little known snack is the lentil Vadai, once cooked at home and sold in the streets. How did
One common grain that's used frequently in hawker centres is rice. In its many forms, the grain also binds families as parents, grandparents and children work together producing rice-based dishes.
From street food to smart tech, traditions to trending lifestyles, Singapore Hour is your ultimate insider's guide to travel, work, and play in the Lion City.
